creator: mita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
So bad timing continues;
ghostscript-fonts-other-5.50.tar.gz had been newly created on Dec 15 16:46 PST.
(It was a symbolic link to other-5.10.tar.gz before.)
Filesize and MD5 has been changed.  File names and number of file doesn't change.

diff -rcN japanese/vfghostscript55.sent-pr.981216/Makefile japanese/vfghostscript55/Makefile
*** japanese/vfghostscript55.sent-pr.981216/Makefile	Wed Dec 16 22:22:02 1998
--- japanese/vfghostscript55/Makefile	Thu Dec 17 00:08:14 1998
***************
*** 58,64 ****
  #  downloading distfiles, do not change these when upgrading the port
  #  unless the files really change.
  GS_FONTS_STD=	ghostscript-fonts-std-5.10a.tar.gz
! GS_FONTS_OTHER=	ghostscript-fonts-other-5.10.tar.gz
  
  pre-fetch:
  .if !defined(PDFENCRYPT)
--- 58,64 ----
  #  downloading distfiles, do not change these when upgrading the port
  #  unless the files really change.
  GS_FONTS_STD=	ghostscript-fonts-std-5.10a.tar.gz
! GS_FONTS_OTHER=	ghostscript-fonts-other-5.50.tar.gz
  
  pre-fetch:
  .if !defined(PDFENCRYPT)
diff -rcN japanese/vfghostscript55.sent-pr.981216/files/md5 japanese/vfghostscript55/files/md5
*** japanese/vfghostscript55.sent-pr.981216/files/md5	Wed Dec 16 10:56:01 1998
--- japanese/vfghostscript55/files/md5	Thu Dec 17 00:08:20 1998
***************
*** 10,13 ****
  MD5 (gdevnpdl-1.5.tar.gz) = 8b1185b489c14c723f0fd0960fccffa0
  MD5 (epag-3.07.tar.gz) = 9f6232e89b89dd9257d0caae414b998b
  MD5 (ghostscript-fonts-std-5.10a.tar.gz) = 8462a429e2672d332a510da076dca6d2
! MD5 (ghostscript-fonts-other-5.10.tar.gz) = 703bcc5592f4b4644cda454bcc45c7d6
--- 10,13 ----
  MD5 (gdevnpdl-1.5.tar.gz) = 8b1185b489c14c723f0fd0960fccffa0
  MD5 (epag-3.07.tar.gz) = 9f6232e89b89dd9257d0caae414b998b
  MD5 (ghostscript-fonts-std-5.10a.tar.gz) = 8462a429e2672d332a510da076dca6d2
! MD5 (ghostscript-fonts-other-5.50.tar.gz) = 437864687feb4392862bb09abd3ce876
---
MITA%Hope this bad timing has been finished...xx
